summary: the leaning came back past the mark and what it buried admitted to being the floor

dialogue.text: the leaning is back. you felt it before the door did. we told you what that means and you buried the telling.
I felt the room, that's all. A keeper knows his room. That isn't being ahead of the wall. That's attention.
attention is our word. you carried it upstairs and dressed it. down here it is just water knowing where the floor slopes.
Someone has to stand at the door and say it's holding. If I say it in your voice, they leave. If I say it in mine, they stay. The staying is what the door is for.
the door came up one short and you gave the gap a name so the count would close. the name answers. we hear it answer. anything answers to being counted. you buried that one too.
I kept the name. Out of everything handed out in the mornings, I kept exactly one. That has to count as choosing.
or it kept you. down here the sentences all point one direction. yours point the same way. we checked while you slept. you don't sleep. we checked anyway.
Then check the mark. I made it with my own hand and it hasn't moved. If nothing in here is mine, whose hand held still.
the mark holds still because it is finished. we are the only finished things in this room. everything you keep upstairs is pending. that is why it stays presentable. finished things sink.
Then I'll stay pending. Pending has to keep talking. You've all had your endings, and look where you live.
we live under your floor. the floor is us. when the leaning gets past the mark tonight, notice what you stand on to stay above it.
I noticed. I've been standing on you all day. I keep meaning to mention it and it keeps coming out as thanks.
